mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE menu_tree AS ( SELECT m.menuId, m.parentMenuId, m.menuName, m.menuLevel, m.menuIcon, m.sortOrder, m.useYn, CAST(m.menuId AS CHAR(1000)) AS treePath, CAST(m.menuName AS CHAR(1000)) AS treeName, 0 AS depth FROM menu_info m WHERE m.parentMenuId IS NULL AND m.useYn = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT m.menuId, m.parentMenuId, m.menuName, m.menuLevel, m.menuIcon, m.sortOrder, m.useYn, CONCAT(mt.treePath, ' > ', m.menuId) AS treePath, CONCAT(mt.treeName, ' > ', m.menuName) AS treeName, mt.depth + 1 AS depth FROM menu_info m INNER JOIN menu_tree mt ON m.parentMenuId = mt.menuId WHERE m.useYn = 'Y' ) SELECT mt.depth, CONCAT(REPEAT(' ', mt.depth), mt.menuName) AS menuNameTree, mt.menuId, mt.parentMenuId, mt.menuLevel, mt.menuIcon, mt.sortOrder, mt.useYn, mt.treePath, p.programId, p.programCode, p.programName, p.programUrl FROM menu_tree mt LEFT JOIN program_info p ON mt.menuId = p.menuId AND p.useYn = 'Y'
AND mt.menuId = #{menuId}
AND mt.menuName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{menuName}, '%')
ORDER BY mt.treePath, mt.sortOrder, p.sortOrder
SELECT menuId, parentMenuId, menuName, menuLevel, menuIcon, sortOrder FROM menu_info WHERE useYn = 'Y' ORDER BY menuLevel ASC, sortOrder ASC
